findings.evidence: `rg -n "degreeCorrection_eq_self_of_mem_picZero|degreeCorrection_coe_picZero|noncomputable def degreeCorrection|lemma degreeCorrection_mem_picZero" code/TauCeti/AlgebraicGeometry/WeilDivisor` shows the new generic lemmas at `AbelJacobiDegreeSplitting.lean:78` and `:86`, while `degreeCorrection` and its landing lemma are defined in `DegreeSplitting.lean:113` and `:126`.
findings.fix: Move these lemmas to `TauCeti/AlgebraicGeometry/WeilDivisor/DegreeSplitting.lean` near `degreeCorrection_mem_picZero`; leave only Abel-Jacobi-specific splitting formulas in this file.
findings.issue: `degreeCorrection_eq_self_of_mem_picZero` and `degreeCorrection_coe_picZero` are generic facts about `degreeCorrection` and `picZero`, not Abel-Jacobi compatibility, so users of `DegreeSplitting` only must import the Abel-Jacobi compatibility file to get them.

summary: The Abel-Jacobi/splitting compatibility lemmas are in a natural downstream file with direct imports, but the PR also places general degree-correction API there instead of in the degree-splitting file where it belongs.
